summary: While this role offers the predictable 9-to-5 schedule and long-term sustainability you desire, it presents a significant mismatch with your cognitive strengths. The core tasks require high-level logical deduction, statistical literacy, and the interpretation of ambiguous regulations rather than the procedural, protocol-driven work you excel at. Given the 'zero-error' expectations and heavy analytical demands, this position may lead to significant performance-related stress despite its excellent work-life balance.
